```{r}
library(tidyverse)
pepdata_aipbmin <- read.table("Inputs/combined_peptide_Aiptasia_and_Bmin.tsv", sep= "\t",  header=TRUE, quote="")
pepdata_aipbmin_shared <- pepdata_aipbmin %>% filter(str_detect(Protein.ID,"AIP")|str_detect(Mapped.Proteins,"AIP"))
nrow(pepdata_aipbmin_shared)

pepdata_aiponly <- read.table("Inputs/combined_peptide_Aiptasia_only.tsv", sep="\t",header=TRUE, quote="")
pepdata_aiponly_shared <- pepdata_aiponly %>% filter(str_detect(Protein.ID,"AIP")|str_detect(Mapped.Proteins,"AIP"))
nrow(pepdata_aiponly_shared)

dropped_peps_fromcombined <- anti_join(pepdata_aipbmin_shared, pepdata_aiponly_shared, by="Peptide.Sequence" )
dropped_peps_fromaiponly <- anti_join(pepdata_aiponly_shared, pepdata_aipbmin_shared, by="Peptide.Sequence" )

nrow(dropped_peps_fromcombined) + nrow(dropped_peps_fromaiponly)

unique_peptides_combined <- bind_rows(dropped_peps_fromcombined, dropped_peps_fromaiponly)

Aip_only_symenriched <- read.csv("Aiptasia_only_search_output/Symbiosome_enriched_proteins.csv")
Combined_symenriched <- read.csv("Aiptasia_Bmin_search_output/Symbiosome_enriched_proteins.csv")


# Check presence of unique peptides in each enriched list
unique_peptides_combined <- unique_peptides_combined %>%
  mutate(
    in_aiponly_enriched = Protein.ID %in% Aip_only_symenriched$Protein.ID,
    in_combined_enriched = Protein.ID %in% Combined_symenriched$Protein.ID
  )

# Summary
cat("Unique peptides in Aiptasia-only enriched list:", sum(unique_peptides_combined$in_aiponly_enriched), "\n")
cat("Unique peptides in combined enriched list:", sum(unique_peptides_combined$in_combined_enriched), "\n")
cat("Unique peptides in both enriched lists:", sum(unique_peptides_combined$in_aiponly_enriched & unique_peptides_combined$in_combined_enriched), "\n")
cat("Unique peptides in neither enriched list:", sum(!unique_peptides_combined$in_aiponly_enriched & !unique_peptides_combined$in_combined_enriched), "\n")


unique_proteins_combined <- unique_peptides_combined %>%
  group_by(Protein.ID) %>%
  summarise(
    in_aiponly_enriched = any(in_aiponly_enriched),
    in_combined_enriched = any(in_combined_enriched)
  )

cat("Unique proteins in Aiptasia-only enriched list:", sum(unique_proteins_combined$in_aiponly_enriched), "\n")
cat("Unique proteins in combined enriched list:", sum(unique_proteins_combined$in_combined_enriched), "\n")
cat("Unique proteins in both enriched lists:", sum(unique_proteins_combined$in_aiponly_enriched & unique_proteins_combined$in_combined_enriched), "\n")
cat("Unique proteins in neither enriched list:", sum(!unique_proteins_combined$in_aiponly_enriched & !unique_proteins_combined$in_combined_enriched), "\n")
```


```{r}
# Replace zeros with NA in intensity columns for both dataframes
intensity_cols <- c("Symbiosome_1.Intensity", "Symbiosome_2.Intensity", "Symbiosome_3.Intensity",
                    "Symbiosome_4.Intensity", "Symbiosome_5.Intensity", "Symbiosome_6.Intensity")

pepdata_aiponly_shared <- pepdata_aiponly_shared %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(intensity_cols), ~na_if(., 0)))

pepdata_aipbmin_shared <- pepdata_aipbmin_shared %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(intensity_cols), ~na_if(., 0)))

# Get peptide counts and mean intensity per protein for each search
aiponly_protein_stats <- pepdata_aiponly_shared %>%
  group_by(Protein.ID) %>%
  summarise(
    peptide_count = n(),
    mean_intensity = mean(c(Symbiosome_1.Intensity, Symbiosome_2.Intensity, Symbiosome_3.Intensity,
                            Symbiosome_4.Intensity, Symbiosome_5.Intensity, Symbiosome_6.Intensity), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(has_dropped_peptide = Protein.ID %in% unique_proteins_combined$Protein.ID)

combined_protein_stats <- pepdata_aipbmin_shared %>%
  group_by(Protein.ID) %>%
  summarise(
    peptide_count = n(),
    mean_intensity = mean(c(Symbiosome_1.Intensity, Symbiosome_2.Intensity, Symbiosome_3.Intensity,
                            Symbiosome_4.Intensity, Symbiosome_5.Intensity, Symbiosome_6.Intensity), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(has_dropped_peptide = Protein.ID %in% unique_proteins_combined$Protein.ID)

# Compare
aiponly_protein_stats %>%
  group_by(has_dropped_peptide) %>%
  summarise(
    n_proteins = n(),
    median_peptide_count = median(peptide_count),
    median_intensity = median(mean_intensity, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

combined_protein_stats %>%
  group_by(has_dropped_peptide) %>%
  summarise(
    n_proteins = n(),
    median_peptide_count = median(peptide_count),
    median_intensity = median(mean_intensity, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```



```{r}
scrampeps <- read.table("Inputs/combined_peptide_Aiptasia_Bminscram.tsv", sep="\t", header=TRUE)
AIP_pepcounts <- sum(grepl("AIP", scrampeps$Protein.ID) | grepl("AIP", scrampeps$Mapped.Proteins))

AIP_peps <- scrampeps %>% filter(grepl("AIP", Protein.ID) | grepl("AIP", Mapped.Proteins))

sum(grepl("symb", AIP_peps$Protein.ID) | grepl("symb", AIP_peps$Mapped.Proteins))
```


```{r}

library(tidyverse)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. LOAD YOUR DATA
#    Replace the file paths below with your actual files.
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

Aip_search <- read.csv("Aiptasia_only_search_output/Symbiosome_enriched_proteins.csv", header=TRUE)
Combined_search <- read.csv("Aiptasia_Bmin_search_output/Symbiosome_enriched_proteins.csv", header=TRUE)
Bminremoved_Aip_search <- read.csv("Aiptasia_only_search_Bmin_removed_output/Symbiosome_enriched_proteins.csv", header=TRUE)
Bminremoved_combined_search <- read.csv("Aiptasia_Bmin_search_Bmin_removed_output/Symbiosome_enriched_proteins.csv", header=TRUE)
BminScram_search <- read.csv("Aiptasia_Bminscram_search_output/Symbiosome_enriched_proteins.csv", header=TRUE)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 2. EXTRACT PROTEIN IDs & TAG EACH LIST
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

tag_list <- function(df, list_name) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::select(Protein.ID, Hit.description) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    mutate(!!list_name := TRUE)          # adds a TRUE column named after the list
}

aip_tagged              <- tag_list(Aip_search,                  "Aip_search")
combined_tagged         <- tag_list(Combined_search,             "Combined_search")
bminremoved_tagged      <- tag_list(Bminremoved_Aip_search,      "Bminremoved_Aip_search")
bminremoved_comb_tagged <- tag_list(Bminremoved_combined_search, "Bminremoved_combined_search")
bminscram_tagged        <- tag_list(BminScram_search,            "BminScram_search")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3. FULL JOIN ALL FIVE LISTS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

combined_all <- aip_tagged %>%
  full_join(combined_tagged,         by = "Protein.ID", suffix = c("", ".combined")) %>%
  full_join(bminremoved_tagged,      by = "Protein.ID", suffix = c("", ".bmin")) %>%
  full_join(bminremoved_comb_tagged, by = "Protein.ID", suffix = c("", ".bmincomb")) %>%
  full_join(bminscram_tagged,        by = "Protein.ID", suffix = c("", ".scram")) %>%
  # Coalesce Hit.description across all five sources into one column
  mutate(
    Hit.description = coalesce(
      Hit.description,
      Hit.description.combined,
      Hit.description.bmin,
      Hit.description.bmincomb,
      Hit.description.scram
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Hit.description.combined, -Hit.description.bmin,
         -Hit.description.bmincomb, -Hit.description.scram) %>%
  # Replace NA with FALSE (protein absent in that list)
  mutate(across(c(Aip_search, Combined_search, Bminremoved_Aip_search,
                  Bminremoved_combined_search, BminScram_search),
                ~ replace_na(.x, FALSE)))

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 4. ADD A SUMMARY COLUMN: which lists contain the protein?
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

list_names <- c("Aip_search", "Combined_search", "Bminremoved_Aip_search",
                "Bminremoved_combined_search", "BminScram_search")

combined_all <- combined_all %>%
  mutate(
    Present_in = pmap_chr(
      dplyr::select(., all_of(list_names)),
      function(...) {
        flags <- c(...)
        paste(list_names[flags], collapse = " | ")
      }
    )
  )

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 5. OPTIONAL: SORT — proteins in all 5 lists first
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

combined_all <- combined_all %>%
  arrange(desc(Aip_search), desc(Combined_search), desc(Bminremoved_Aip_search),
          desc(Bminremoved_combined_search), desc(BminScram_search))

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 6. PREVIEW & SAVE
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

print(combined_all)

# Quick summary: how many proteins per combination?
cat("\n── Membership summary ──────────────────────────\n")
combined_all %>%
  count(Present_in, sort = TRUE) %>%
  print()

write_csv(combined_all, "protein_comparison_output.csv")
cat("\nSaved → protein_comparison_output.csv\n")
```
